allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npx, python, python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Get-Command python3.11, py, iisexpress -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'python|node|ruby' })

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:PATH"; cd "C:\\Users\\ejaes\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\6_30_26"; npm install --save-dev electron electron-builder 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:PATH"; cd "C:\\Users\\ejaes\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\6_30_26"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "start" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; if \(!$p.HasExited\) { "App launched successfully \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)"; $p.Kill\(\) } else { "Process exited with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" })
